content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-openrouter Daily Update (Apr 25, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 25, 2026, focused on improving repository compatibility and environment stability by removing accidental PGlite in-memory database artifacts that were causing git checkout issues on Windows systems.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Repository Cleanup and Compatibility
*   Removed accidentally committed PGlite in-memory database directories from the repository to resolve git checkout conflicts on Windows environments.
*   Updated `.gitignore` to prevent future commits of these database artifacts.
*   Relevant PR: [#25](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-openrouter/pull/25)

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
